title: Fix Claude config backup/restore (MCPs, HUD)
description: Claude config backup incomplete — MCPs and HUD settings not backed up/restored properly. Reference guides: https://github.com/jtklinger/claude-code-backup-guide and https://dirkstrauss.com/claude-code-windows-migration-guide/ — crawl these to identify what files/dirs need backing up. Fix backup process to include all necessary config.

title: Verify and review rtk modification in claude_code role
description: rtk install changed from dpkg (amd64-only) to curl-based installer supporting both amd64 and aarch64. Need to verify molecule test passes and review the implementation for correctness.

title: Revisit molecule-testing skill and rule-reading workflow
description: Currently working on molecule-testing skill (.claude/skills/molecule-testing/SKILL.md). Review the full workflow: how agents discover and read the molecule test rule, whether the skill frontmatter triggers correctly in Claude Code context, and whether the rule index in AGENTS.md points to the skill correctly. Subtask of ansible-all-my-things-l10.

title: Review rule changes before session end
description: Before ending the session, review all rule/skill changes made during ansible-all-my-things-l10 to verify consistency and completeness. Check that deleted cursor rules are not referenced anywhere, new skill files are properly indexed, and AGENTS.md reflects the actual state of the workspace.

title: Adapt agent rules and skills to AI agent workspace changes
description: Adapting the agent rules and skills to reflect recent changes made in the AI agent workspace. This includes updating .cursor/rules, skills, and related configuration to stay in sync with the evolving workspace setup.

title: Add RTK to claude_code Ansible role
description: Install RTK token-optimizer (https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk) for all desktop_users and activate via Claude Code PreToolUse hook. Extend molecule verify test.
close_reason: All done: install, configure, verify, molecule green x3, architect APPROVED

title: Map project-specific skills to ai-agent-workspace roles
description: Review which project-specific skills in this repo can be linked to modified roles or skills in the ai-agent-workspace repository. Examples: memory-bank-branches (510-memory-bank-branches.mdc deleted here), project-specific-documentation-strategy (610 rule). Identify gaps and decide whether to update, remove, or create new skill files.
